title: TypeScript Worker and Persistence Lifecycle Quarantine

queued_jobs.procedure: Start TypeScript rollback only after the Go claimant and completer are stopped and single-owner status is verified.

running_jobs.procedure: Wait for Go completion or lease expiry before TypeScript rollback claim.

expired_leases.procedure: Reclaim only after lease expiry and no running Go owner check.

retries.procedure: Preserve retry classification and do not convert strategy failures into system failures.

exhausted_failures.procedure: Retain existing exhausted-failure state and review before retry reset.

incomplete_matchsets.procedure: Do not silently refresh scoring from TypeScript; rollback scoring requires an operator note.

scoring_public_evidence.procedure: Selected normal public summaries, replay metadata, and replay evidence stay Go-owned; TypeScript DTO paths are parity, rollback, or deferred only.

stopped_go.procedure: Verify Go job claimant and completer are stopped before TypeScript rollback starts.

stopped_runtime_service.procedure: Runtime service stoppage is a runtime failure path, not permission for TypeScript backend fallback.
